ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code for the course (e.g., LTWR 100) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Winter 2020, Spring 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of term (e.g., Regular, Summer) */,
  "term_status" TEXT /* Status of the term (e.g., Active, Planned, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the course is offered */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the course is offered */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Section number of the course offering */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course (e.g., MWF 9:00-10:15) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student submitting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "recommend_class" REAL /* Student's rating of the course (e.g., 100% = highly recommended) */,
  "recommend_instructor" REAL /* Student's rating of the instructor (e.g., 100% = highly recommended) */,
  "study_hours_per_week" REAL /* Number of hours the student studied per week */,
  "avg_grade_expected" TEXT /* Average grade the student expected to receive in the course */,
  "avg_grade_received" TEXT /* Average grade the student actually received in the course */,
  "overall_satisfaction" REAL /* Overall satisfaction of the student with the course */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback provided by the student */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., Reviewed, Unreviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study of the student (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., English Department) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course instructor */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., Primary Instructor, Teaching Assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the question in the overall evaluation */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the question is currently active and used in evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the answer belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "score" REAL /* Numerical score if the question is multiple choice */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_answers_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES evaluation_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "course_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "overall_course_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the course based on the evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_evaluations" (
  "instructor_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor evaluation */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "overall_instructor_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the instructor based on the evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_evaluations" (
  "student_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student evaluation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student submitting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "overall_student_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the student based on the evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_evaluations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average grade, student satisfaction) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_evaluations" (
  "department_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department evaluation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "overall_department_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the department based on the evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_evaluations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_evaluations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
